name: Nelly Uchendu
description: '''Nelly Uzonna Edith Uchendu,''' {{Audio|LL-Q33578 (ibo)-Vivian Amalachukwu-Nelly Uzonna Edith Uchendu.wav|Listen|help=no}} [[Order of the Niger|MON]] (1950 {{ndash}} 12 April 2005), was a Nigerian singer, composer and actress. Revered for modernising traditional [[Igbo people|Igbo]] folk music, Uchendu rose to prominence upon the release of her 1976 song "Love Nwantinti" which earned her the "Lady with the Golden Voice" sobriquet. She released 6 [[LP record]]ings during her career.
